basic_details.job_title: EPI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Manager, Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2), Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3), Senior Manager - Legal (E-4)
basic_details.short_information: Engineering Projects India (EPI) has officially announced the Manager and Senior Manager Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published on 11 July 2026 at the official EPI website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 35 to 42 years and hold qualifications such as CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance) with minimum 55% marks in graduation or LLB/5 Years Integrated LLB with minimum 55% marks can submit their online applications from 11 July 2026 to 20 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2): 35 Years Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3): 37 Years Senior Manager - Legal (E-4): 42 Years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC(NCL), 10 years for PWD for reserved posts.

qualification.education_qualification: CA/ICWA/MBA(Finance) with minimum 55% marks in graduation, LLB/ 5 years integrated LLB (min. 55% marks)
qualification.details: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2): CA/ICWA/MBA(Finance) with minimum 55% marks in graduation. Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3): LLB/ 5 years integrated LLB (min. 55% marks). Senior Manager - Legal (E-4): LLB/ 5 years integrated LLB (min. 55% marks).

salary_details.details: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2): Rs. 50,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3): Rs. 60,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance Senior Manager - Legal (E-4): Rs. 70,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the EPI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of EPI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.engineering_projects_india_epi: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2), Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3), Senior Manager - Legal (E-4)
CA/ICWA/MBA(Finance) with minimum 55% marks in graduation, LLB/ 5 years integrated LLB (min. 55% marks)

content_sections.heading: EPI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the EPI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download EPI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: EPI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2): CA/ICWA/MBA(Finance) with minimum 55% marks in graduation. Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3): LLB/ 5 years integrated LLB (min. 55% marks). Senior Manager - Legal (E-4): LLB/ 5 years integrated LLB (min. 55% marks).

content_sections.heading: EPI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2): 35 Years Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3): 37 Years Senior Manager - Legal (E-4): 42 Years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC(NCL), 10 years for PWD for reserved posts.

content_sections.heading: EPI Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2): Rs. 50,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3): Rs. 60,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance Senior Manager - Legal (E-4): Rs. 70,000/- per month + Applicable House Rent Allowance

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the EPI Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of EPI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the EPI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the EPI recruitment is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Manager (Finance) post?
faq.answer: For the Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2) post, candidates must possess a CA/ICWA/MBA(Finance) degree with a minimum of 55% marks in their graduation.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Manager - Legal post?
faq.answer: The Senior Manager - Legal (E-4) position offers a salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month, along with applicable House Rent Allowance.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available in this EPI recruitment?
faq.answer: Engineering Projects India (EPI) has announced a total of 4 vacancies for the positions of Manager Gr.-II-Finance (E-2), Manager Gr.I-Legal (E-3), and Senior Manager - Legal (E-4).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these EPI posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview and document verification of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this job?
faq.answer: The notification mentions Delhi as the state and city. While the application is online, candidates should check the official notification for any location-specific requirements or transfer possibilities.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the advertised positions in this Engineering Projects India (EPI) recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per government norms: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC(NCL), and 10 years for PWD candidates for reserved posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
